hoa_balance_response: You can view your account information by logging into the Owner Portal at https://brickellhouse.connectresident.com/. If you don't have an account, you can sign up by scrolling to the bottom of the login page.
hoa_payments_response: No, HOA payments cannot be made through Luna or this website. Please use the Owner Portal for HOA account matters.
legal_advice_response: I'm not an attorney, so I'm unable to provide legal advice. Please consult an attorney or another qualified legal resource.
board_discussion_response: I don't have access to Board meeting discussions. If you're looking for meeting information, please contact Management.
security_footage: Do not provide security footage. Route to Management.
